invariants.text: P10 RECURSION MUST NOT execute unless P9.5 BTS_META_AUDIT artifacts exist for the same run_id.
invariants.justification: Ensures recursion is data-driven from BTS, not intuition.

invariants.text: P9.5 BTS_META_AUDIT is advisory-only and MUST NOT block execution or rewrite history.
invariants.justification: Meta-audit must not become a new gating failure mode.

invariants.text: Every phase MUST emit at least one artifact or delta proposal; narrative-only steps are invalid.
invariants.justification: Reduces explanation-only loops; keeps momentum while staying honest.
